meta.title: ATHAR — WhatsApp Automation for Egyptian Clinics
meta.description: From unread messages to every patient replied in 30 seconds. Less than a quarter of a receptionist. 14-day guarantee.

hero.headline_1: From "message left unread" → "every patient replied in 30 seconds"
hero.headline_2: in your first 7 days — even at 2 AM.
hero.subline: A receptionist costs EGP 8,000–12,000/month — and still misses messages after 6 PM. ATHAR runs 24/7 for less than a quarter of that.
hero.cta_secondary: Try the reply on WhatsApp now ←
hero.badge: 14-day guarantee: If we don't get your response time under 30 seconds within two weeks of launch — you pay nothing for that month.

problem.headline: Patients reach out. The clinic sleeps.
problem.subline: Not a failing on your part — it's the natural limit of any clinic without someone on WhatsApp 24/7.

pains.title: "Good evening, I'd like to book" — at 10 PM
pains.body: The patient messaged. No reply. They woke up and booked with whoever answered. 35% of potential patients go to a competitor if you don't respond within two hours.

pains.title: "We'll remind you before your appointment" — but nobody does
pains.body: Two hours a day on manual reminders. And still — 20% of patients cancel last minute. Every empty slot is EGP 500–2,000 in direct lost revenue.

pains.title: "Have you been here before?" — and you can't remember
pains.body: Patient history in WhatsApp, appointments in your head, notes on paper. 60% of returning patients get asked the same questions again — because there's no single record.

problem.transition: We noticed high-intent patients leaving messages on clinic WhatsApp after 10 PM — not because the clinic was bad, but because no one was there. We built a system that replies in under 15 seconds, qualifies, and books. Result: zero unanswered messages after 10 PM.

solution.headline: Every conversation becomes data. Your clinic learns with every patient.
solution.subline: Not a generic bot. A system built on your clinic's flow — try it on WhatsApp now and watch the reply land in under 15 seconds.

pillars.title: A complete patient file — without typing a word
pillars.body: Every WhatsApp message logged: name, inquiry, appointment, patient status. After 90 days you have a 300+ patient database — with zero manual entry.

pillars.title: Reply in 15 seconds — see it yourself
pillars.body: Send a WhatsApp message right now. The system replies, qualifies, and books — in the same conversation. This is exactly what happens when every patient contacts your clinic.

pillars.title: A full schedule — without reminder calls
pillars.body: Automatic confirmation + 24-hour reminder + rescheduling. Clinics on FLOW cut cancellations by 60% in the first 30 days.

tiers.headline: Choose what fits your clinic.
tiers.subline: Every plan includes a 14-day guarantee — if you don't see a difference in response time, you don't pay.

process.headline: 3 deliverables. Not 3 meetings.
process.subline: Every step has a specific output — not "we'll talk and see."

steps.title: Your Patient Drop-Off Map (45 min)
steps.body: We map your current WhatsApp and appointment flow — and pinpoint exactly where patients are lost: late replies, missed appointments, or missing data. You keep the map.

steps.title: A Live System Connected to Your Tools (5–14 days)
steps.body: We build the automation, connect WhatsApp, calendar, and CRM, and test it with real scenarios from your clinic — before any patient sees it.

steps.title: Your First 30 Days in a Dashboard
steps.body: System goes live. We track with you: response time, bookings, cancellations. If the numbers aren't on target — we adjust until they are.

proof.headline: Numbers from Egyptian clinics — not estimates.
proof.subline: Measurable outcomes in the first 30 days after launch.

testimonials.quote: 40% of nighttime WhatsApp messages went unanswered. Now every message gets a reply in under 20 seconds — and 15 new appointments in the first week.
testimonials.name: Dr. Mariam Salem

testimonials.quote: I spent 11 hours a week on reminders. The system handles it automatically. Cancellations dropped 60% in the first 30 days.
testimonials.name: Dr. Ahmed El-Sharif

items.a: 14-day guarantee: If we don't get your response time under 30 seconds within two weeks of launch — you pay nothing for that month. No exceptions.

items.q: Is this right for my small clinic?
items.a: Yes — if you have even one patient messaging on WhatsApp and you can't reply within two hours. CORE is built exactly for clinics starting out. If you don't use WhatsApp at all — no, it's not for you.
CORE: 5–7 days to first auto-reply. FLOW: 10–14 days to a full schedule with reminders. ELITE: 2–3 weeks depending on specialty.

items.q: Do I need to change how I work?
items.a: No. The WhatsApp you use today stays. We add automation behind it. No new app, no long training.

items.q: Will it work with my existing tools?
items.a: WhatsApp Business, Google Calendar, and most CRMs. We'll tell you exactly after your Drop-Off Map (step one).
Yes — every plan includes ongoing support. ELITE includes an account manager who reviews your numbers weekly.

footer.tagline: ATHAR — from unread message to 30-second reply.
footer.cta_headline: Watch the system reply in 15 seconds
footer.cta_subline: Free 45-minute consultation — or send a WhatsApp message right now.
